rationale.risk-routing: Learned policy tiers proposed actions into silent, flagged, or human review.
rationale.hitl-workflow: Action-level permissions and plan gates enable approval, denial, and revocation.
rationale.oversight-explanation: Check-ins explain triggers; summaries distinguish policy-driven from model-driven interruptions.
rationale.agent-scope-drift: Hard constraints and phase checks bound protected paths and off-stage actions.
rationale.survey-input: Survey quantifies experienced developers’ concerns and preferred check-in patterns.
rationale.framework: Hedwig offers a reusable dynamic-autonomy pipeline architecture.
rationale.built-system: Authors implemented and released a working Python CLI prototype.
rationale.agentic: The agent plans and edits multi-file artifacts behind lifecycle gates.
rationale.steering: Retrieved behavioral guidance substantively shapes future generation prompts.
